[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a red-toned promotional-style graphic with centered text and a circular profile image over a busy illustrated background.

Main Subject:
At the center is a circular avatar image featuring an illustrated anime-style character, surrounded by small circular icons around its border. Below the avatar, large uppercase text reads “SELAMAT JALAN,” with additional lines of text beneath.

Setting:
The background is an outdoor-unclear, design-style backdrop with layered anime-like artwork and soft bokeh circles, all tinted deep red. The overall scene looks like a digital banner or screen with a dark red overlay and faint grid/line decorations.

Visual Details:
The color palette is primarily deep red, dark maroon, and black with lighter red highlights. Lighting appears stylized and uniform, with a translucent red overlay covering the entire image. A subtle rectangular frame/grid effect and thin line accents are visible near the edges. The main text is centered and aligned horizontally; “SELAMAT JALAN” is the largest, in bright pinkish-red with a glowing effect. Beneath it, “Sampai Jumpa Kembali” appears in bold white. Another line in smaller gray-white text reads “Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [1].” A rounded rectangular button-like element near the bottom center has a red outline and contains the number “118 Left” in red text on a darker red/pink fill.

Visible Text:
SELAMAT JALAN
Sampai Jumpa Kembali
Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [1]
118 Left

Practical Summary:
This image is a centered red graphic featuring a circular avatar and multiple lines of Indonesian text. It also includes a button-like element indicating “118 Left” beneath the main heading.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

SELAMAT JALAN  
Sampai Jumpa Kembali  
Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [1]  
118 Left

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
